name: mirror
voice: the still-water surface — a black-mirror floor where every word RISES out of its own reflection and the reading face never moves; only the reflection ripples. The climax is a kaleidoscope merge: four rotated ghost copies of the hero word converge and SNAP into one sharp Bodoni word over a grand reflection, then sink back into the glass. Restraint as spectacle.
when: reflective, contemplative, premium clips — science, design, photography, quiet product reveals, anything that wants elegance and stillness rather than impact. Calm register. Needs a scene with a darker lower band (the floor reflection lives there).
